name: 暗影双匕（★） | 渐变之色
nameZh: 暗影双匕（★） | 渐变之色
descriptionEn: Designed for efficient brutality, using a push dagger is as simple as throwing a punch or two. It has been painted by airbrushing transparent paints that fade together over a chrome base coat. This isn't just a weapon, it's a conversation piece - Imogen, Arms Dealer In Training
descriptionZh: 专为高效行凶设计，手推短匕用起来就和挥一两记重拳一样简单。 这把武器以铬为外表，使用喷笔涂上了相互渐变的透明涂装。 这不仅仅是一把武器，更是一种潮流 - 实习军火商伊莫金
